pinterest_cluster_labels: Emerald zellige bathroom with brass fixtures
Compact green-tile bathroom with raw wood vanity
Walnut kitchen with deep green vertical tile backsplash
Art-forward warm bedroom / living — terracotta & collected pieces

cluster_summary.label: Emerald zellige bathroom with brass fixtures
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Deep glossy emerald zellige tiles laid in stacked/brick patterns, warm brushed brass fittings (shower, sconces, mirrors), layered natural stone or terrazzo shower floors, live botanicals and woven basket textures. Stage with matte-black or dark planter, brass hardware, stone vessel sink, soft warm LED sconces to emphasize glaze depth.

cluster_summary.label: Compact green-tile bathroom with raw wood vanity
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Narrow vertical/stacked green tiles with high gloss finish paired with a floating reclaimed-wood vanity and rounded brass mirror. Add warm filament bulbs, small hanging plant, and textured woven rug to soften tile reflectivity and create a cozy, spa-like micro-bath.

cluster_summary.label: Walnut kitchen with deep green vertical tile backsplash
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Warm walnut cabinetry and marble counters combined with deep green, slightly textured vertical subway tiles. Use minimal brass accents (pendant hardware or pulls), pale marble countertops and geometric floor patterning. Stage with wooden cutting boards, matte ceramic canisters and muted greenery.

cluster_summary.label: Art-forward warm bedroom / living — terracotta & collected pieces
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Mid-century low-profile furniture and gallery-style wall composition with bold terracotta/orange artworks and mixed vintage frames. Layer rugs with tribal motifs, velvet or wool upholstery in rust/brown tones, and sculptural lighting. Stage with curated objects, books, and a few large plants to keep the composition grounded and warm.
